hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git (add|commit)'; then STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); BLOCKED=''; for f in $STAGED; do case "$f" in .env|.env.*|*.pem|*.key|*credentials*|*secret*) BLOCKED="$BLOCKED $f" ;; esac; done; if [ -n "$BLOCKED" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: sensitive files staged:$BLOCKED — unstage them before committing" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0
